title: Weapons Found in Kindergarten Student's Backpack
summary: A pistol and knife were discovered in a kindergarten student's backpack at an Indian Land school. Investigators believe the child was unaware of the weapons.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about school safety and the potential for accidental harm to students and staff.

title: UNC Charlotte Class Uses March Madness to Teach Sports Betting
summary: UNC Charlotte students are using March Madness to learn about data analysis and decision-making through a mock sportsbook during the Sweet Sixteen.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates innovative teaching methods and the application of analytics in sports and entertainment.

title: Murder Sentence Upheld in 2017 Chesterfield County Shooting
summary: The murder sentence for James Brown, an accomplice in the deadly 2017 shooting of James Henderson Jr., has been upheld.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on local crime cases and the judicial process.

title: Middle Schooler Dies in Golf Cart Crash in Mooresville
summary: A middle school student died in a golf cart crash on Swamp Rose Drive near Golden Star Lane in Mooresville.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of golf cart use by minors and the tragic consequences of such accidents.

title: Candidate Withdraws After Home Shooting
summary: Mecklenburg Commissioner candidate Aaron Marin withdrew from the race after a shooting at his home forced his family to move.
charlotte_impact: Shows the impact of violence on political participation and community stability.

title: Charlotte Airport Launches Gift Card Drive for TSA Workers
summary: Charlotte airport is holding a gift card drive to support unpaid TSA workers.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates community support for federal employees affected by government shutdowns or funding issues.

title: Residents Concerned Over Charlotte's 2040 Plan Updates
summary: Steeleberry Acres residents voice concerns that Charlotte's 2040 Community Plan could lead to increased industrial development.
charlotte_impact: Reflects community anxieties about urban planning and its potential impact on neighborhoods.

title: Surgery Cancellation Prompts Discrimination Concerns
summary: Novant Health canceled a transgender teen's breast reduction surgery hours before it was scheduled, raising discrimination concerns.
charlotte_impact: Brings attention to issues of discrimination in healthcare and the rights of transgender individuals.

title: Youth Employment Program Needs Partner Businesses
summary: Charlotte youth employment program seeks partner businesses due to a record number of applicants this summer.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of youth employment programs and the need for community support.

title: Man Accused of Killing Father in Charlotte Stabbing
summary: Drazan Sinanovic, 51, is charged with murder in the stabbing death of his father in southeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a serious crime and its impact on the community.

title: Big Warmup Starts Wednesday
summary: A hot streak is expected to begin Wednesday, with Friday potentially breaking records.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather updates and alerts residents to prepare for extreme heat.

title: DaBaby, 50 Cent to Headline Concord Music Festival
summary: DaBaby and 50 Cent will headline the new Be More Grateful Festival in Concord this summer.
charlotte_impact: Announces a major entertainment event and its potential economic impact on the region.

title: American Red Cross Giving Day: How to Help
summary: Wednesday is American Red Cross Giving Day. Support the Red Cross through donations, blood, or volunteering.

title: Millions Losing Coverage as ACA Subsidies Expire
summary: Millions are losing healthcare coverage as ACA subsidies expire and costs surge, data shows.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the impact of healthcare policy changes on access to affordable insurance.

title: Former Coach Pleads Guilty in Child Sex Offense Case
summary: A former youth basketball coach pleaded guilty to a lesser charge in an Anson County child sex offense case.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a sensitive legal case involving a child and a person in a position of trust.
